rulings.Case Title: GILBERT FORBES VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Reconsideration In Granting Deft Union Carbide Corporation'S Mtn For Summary Judgment/Adjudication (Per Nunc Pro Tunc Court Order File On June 9, 2011
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR WEDNESDAY, JUNE 29, 2011 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:30 A.M., LINE 1. Plaintiff¿s motion for reconsideration in granting defendant Union Carbide Corp.¿s motion for summary judgment is denied. A motion for reconsideration can only be granted where the party claiming new or different facts, circumstances or law acted with reasonable diligence to obtain the information claimed to be new or different prior to entry of the order sought to be reconsidered. No such reasonable diligence was shown by plaintiff. = (220/HEK)
